title: Twitter @YichuanM
summary:
(2/N)  Why was scaling neural retrieval previously challenging? ⚡️
Neural retrieval at scale is unforgiving: you need throughput + accuracy + low memory—simultaneously. Linear scan dies instantly, and many open-source setups hit a wall past small-to-mid scale.
